translations.hero_subtitle: Introducing the world's first Humming Propulsion System that's changing the future of aviation. Silent. Efficient. Revolutionary.
translations.vision_founder_quote: Ahmed Hamza is an aerospace engineer, former military R&D officer, and the visionary founder of HPS Aviation. With over a decade of experience in missile mechanics and propulsion systems at the Egyptian Armed Forces Research Center, Ahmed specialized in developing high-performance propulsion technologies under extreme precision and operational demands.
translations.vision_founder_description_1: In 2014, inspired by the flight of hummingbirds, he began exploring a new concept for aerial propulsion — one that would break the limitations of current eVTOL technologies. After years of intensive research, prototyping, and simulation using tools like MATLAB, ANSYS, and CFD, he created the Humming Propulsion System (HPS) — a compact, efficient, and tilt-free propulsion technology capable of revolutionizing how we fly.
translations.vision_founder_description_2: Today, Ahmed leads HPS Aviation, building not only the propulsion system of the future, but also its first product: CROW, a hydrogen-powered flying car that makes the dream of true personal air mobility a reality.
translations.innovation_subtitle: Introducing the Humming Propulsion System (HPS) – a revolutionary approach to flight.
translations.innovation_advantage_1_desc: Mimics the wing dynamics of hummingbirds, enabling precise and powerful multi-directional thrust.
translations.innovation_advantage_2_desc:
Combines rotational motion (from axial flux electric motors) with a controlled oscillating (flapping) motion.
This allows each propulsion unit to adjust angle of attack at every degree of rotation.
translations.innovation_advantage_3_desc:
Enables 6 degrees of freedom (DoF) without tilting the vehicle body.
Allows for fine-tuned movement in any direction — forward, backward, vertical, lateral, pitch, yaw, and roll — with no need for large control surfaces.
translations.innovation_advantage_4_desc: Constantly adjusts the wing angle to minimize aerodynamic drag, which boosts energy efficiency by over 25% compared to traditional propeller systems.
translations.innovation_advantage_5_desc: Uses lightweight, high-torque axial flux electric motors spinning up to 8,500 RPM, delivering exceptional power-to-weight performance.
translations.innovation_advantage_6_desc:
The system is fully scalable, meaning it can power:
Small drones
Personal flying cars
Heavy-lift cargo aircraft
Even large airborne platforms like flying hotels
translations.innovation_advantage_7_desc: Designed to work optimally with hydrogen fuel cells, ensuring long range, zero emissions, and sustainable energy use.
translations.innovation_advantage_8_desc: Thanks to optimized motion and low rotational drag, HPS produces sound levels under 65 dB — comparable to a modern car.
translations.innovation_advantage_9_desc: Redundant control and power paths ensure safety even if one propulsion unit fails.
translations.innovation_key_1_desc:
Reduces drag by dynamically adjusting angle of attack.
Uses less energy for more thrust compared to traditional propellers.
translations.innovation_key_2_desc:
Provides full control in all directions without tilting the aircraft.
Enhances stability, maneuverability, and passenger comfort.
translations.innovation_key_3_desc:
Generates less than 65 dB at 5 meters — quieter than helicopters or traditional drones.
Enables urban use without disturbing communities.
translations.innovation_key_4_desc:
No mechanical tilting of wings or rotors needed.
Simplifies mechanical structure and improves control accuracy.
translations.innovation_key_5_desc:
Easily integrated into a wide range of vehicles:
Drones
Flying cars (like CROW)
Cargo aircraft
Airborne hotels
Reduces footprint while maintaining performance.
translations.innovation_key_6_desc:
Designed to pair with hydrogen fuel cells for long range and zero emissions.
Supports the global transition to clean aviation.
translations.innovation_key_7_desc:
Eliminates complex tilt mechanisms and reduces wear-and-tear.
More reliable and cost-effective in long-term operation.
translations.innovation_key_8_desc:
Power balancing system allows safe landing even with one propulsion unit offline.
Emergency rocket landing system ensures survivability in full failure scenarios.
translations.problem_subtitle: Traditional aircraft propulsion systems face critical limitations that have remained largely unchanged for decades.
translations.problem_1_desc:
Traditional propeller-based propulsion systems waste energy and create excessive drag.
This results in high operating costs and limited range — unsuitable for practical daily use.
translations.problem_2_desc: Rotor noise is often above 90 dB, making it disruptive for urban environments and unacceptable for mass deployment.
translations.problem_3_desc: Most air mobility vehicles still require pilot licenses and complex training, limiting public adoption.
translations.problem_4_desc: Many eVTOLs can only fly short distances and carry 2 passengers — not viable for families or cargo.
translations.problem_5_desc: Current eVTOLs need vertiports, runways, or custom landing infrastructure, which increases cost and delays scalability.
translations.problem_6_title: Lack of True Flying Car Experience
translations.problem_6_desc:
Most eVTOLs resemble drones or mini-helicopters — not the flying car we've all dreamed of.
The market still lacks a vehicle that feels like a car but flies like a jet.
translations.crow_subtitle: Our flagship aircraft showcasing the revolutionary Humming Propulsion System.
translations.crow_app_1_desc:
Commute above traffic in minutes instead of hours.
Land anywhere — rooftops, parking spots, backyards — no need for runways or vertiports.
Ideal for tech-savvy individuals, high-income professionals, or future-forward cities.
translations.crow_app_2_desc:
With high range , CROW can travel between cities and countries — silently and sustainably.
Competes with regional flights but requires no airport.
Perfect for executives, emergency travel, or premium tourism.
translations.crow_app_3_desc:
Reach remote or congested areas quickly in natural disasters, war zones, or pandemics.
Carries medical teams and equipment with minimal landing space needed.
translations.crow_app_4_desc:
With a 450 kg payload capacity and vertical landing, CROW can deliver time-critical packages (medical, high-value, industrial).
Hydrogen range makes it ideal for long-haul or remote logistics.
translations.crow_app_5_desc:
Can land on water, enabling missions around:
Oil rigs
Yachts
Disaster zones at sea
Hybrid drive lets it move on land too — fully amphibious.
translations.crow_app_6_desc:
Offer luxury aerial experiences with breathtaking views and smooth, quiet flights.
Accessible for small groups (up to 5 people).
Perfect for desert, island, or mountain regions where infrastructure is limited.
translations.crow_app_7_desc:
Operate above cities, borders, or sensitive sites for long durations.
Quiet operation and high agility allow for discreet, effective patrols.
translations.crow_spec_10_desc: 360° rotating wheels – functions as a road vehicle
translations.crow_spec_11_desc: Carbon Fiber + Natural Bamboo Composite + Aluminium
translations.crow_spec_15_desc:
10 safety systems including:
* Aerospike rocket-powered emergency landing
* Power balancing for single-unit failure
* Redundant battery backup
translations.invest_subtitle: Join our mission to revolutionize urban air mobility. Explore investment opportunities and resources.
translations.contact_subtitle: Get in touch with us for partnerships, career opportunities, or general inquiries.
translations.presentation_subtitle: The Next Step to the Sky
translations.presentation_description: Revolutionary propulsion technology inspired by nature, designed for the future of aviation.
translations.presentation_problem_title: Why Propellers Are Holding Us Back
translations.presentation_noise_description: Traditional propellers generate excessive noise (85-100 dB), limiting urban applications and causing noise pollution.
translations.presentation_inefficient_description: Current electric propulsion systems waste energy through turbulence and drag, limiting range and performance.
translations.presentation_limited_description: Conventional propulsion offers limited degrees of freedom, requiring complex mechanical systems for maneuverability.
translations.presentation_safety_description: Exposed rotating blades pose significant safety risks in urban environments and crowded areas.
translations.presentation_bulky_description: Propellers are large and usually exposed, which:
translations.presentation_safety_hazards: Poses safety hazards to people or nearby objects
translations.presentation_limits_compactness: Limits vehicle compactness and urban landing use
translations.presentation_nature_description: Our revolutionary propulsion system mimics the efficient wing movements of hummingbirds, combining rotational and oscillatory motion patterns.
translations.presentation_full_control: Full 6 degrees of freedom thrust control
translations.presentation_crow_title: CROW: The First Hydrogen-Powered Flying Car
translations.presentation_land_water: Can land on water and drive on roads
translations.presentation_crow_description_title: CROW is the world's first flying car designed to match the Hollywood dream — a true car that flies, combining the look and feel of a futuristic vehicle with the power and agility of advanced aviation technology.
translations.presentation_crow_description_text: Powered by the revolutionary Humming Propulsion System (HPS), CROW is compact, efficient, and versatile, built for both urban and intercity mobility.
translations.presentation_air_taxis_desc: Urban mobility revolution with on-demand aerial transportation, reducing commute times by 80%.
translations.presentation_cargo_drones_desc: Autonomous delivery systems for last-mile logistics and emergency supplies to remote areas.
translations.presentation_flying_hotels_desc: Luxury aerial accommodations offering unique travel experiences and unprecedented mobility.
translations.presentation_accessible_aviation_desc: Our vision extends beyond technology to democratize flight. With intuitive controls and autonomous capabilities, HPS Aviation will make personal air travel accessible without extensive pilot training.
translations.presentation_phase1_desc: Fundamental research and technology development. Patent portfolio established with 12 core technologies.
translations.presentation_phase2_title: Phase 2: Advanced Prototyping & Company Formation (2021 – First Half 2025)
translations.presentation_phase2_desc: Full-scale working prototype of the CROW flying car. Testing and certification process begins.
translations.presentation_phase3_title: Phase 3: MVP Development & Lab Construction (Second Half 2025)
translations.presentation_phase3_desc: Maiden voyage of the CROW. Public demonstrations and regulatory approval process.
translations.presentation_phase4_title: Phase 4: CROW – First Flying Car Prototype (2026 – 2027)
translations.presentation_phase4_desc: Production facility established. Supply chain secured and manufacturing begins.
translations.presentation_phase5_desc: Commercial launch of the CROW flying car. Initial deliveries to strategic partners and early adopters.
translations.presentation_phase6_desc: Scale the business by expanding HPS integration across multiple flying platforms beyond CROW
translations.presentation_phase1_2014: 2014 – Initial idea inspired by bird and insect flight
translations.presentation_phase1_2015: 2015 – Mathematical modelling of hummingbird wing patterns using MATLAB & ANSYS
translations.presentation_phase1_2016: 2016 – Resigned from military R&D to dedicate full-time focus
translations.presentation_phase1_2017_2020: 2017–2020 – Developed and tested multiple mechanical prototypes
translations.presentation_phase1_efficiency: Achieved 25% higher efficiency compared to traditional propulsion
translations.presentation_phase1_control: Validated full 6-DOF control without tilting the propulsion system
translations.presentation_phase2_detail_title: Phase 2: Advanced Prototyping & Company Formation (2021 – First Half 2025)
translations.presentation_phase2_motor: Finalized scalable axial-flux electric motor architecture
translations.presentation_phase2_company: Registered HPS Aviation and prepared for equity crowdfunding
translations.presentation_phase3_detail_title: Phase 3: MVP Development & Lab Construction (Second Half 2025)
translations.presentation_phase3_lab: Set up R&D lab + acquire equipment (5-axis CNC, lathe, metal 3D printer)
translations.presentation_phase3_mvp: Complete MVP for HPS propulsion system within 6 months
translations.presentation_phase3_patents: Finish Patents registration + certification & safety testing
translations.presentation_phase4_detail_title: Phase 4: CROW – First Flying Car Prototype (2026 – 2027)
translations.presentation_phase4_power: Power: Hydrogen fuel cells + safety batteries
translations.presentation_phase4_safety: Integrate 10 advanced safety systems (including Aerospike emergency landing)
translations.presentation_phase4_testing: Flight tests, government compliance, and certification
translations.presentation_phase4_showcase: Showcase to investors, public, and strategic partners
translations.presentation_phase5_community: Build early adopter community (private owners, corporates, tourism)
translations.presentation_phase5_licensing: Begin licensing HPS propulsion to other platforms (eVTOLs, amphibians)
translations.presentation_phase5_network: Establish after-sales, service, and maintenance network
translations.presentation_phase6_expansion: Global expansion and strategic joint ventures
translations.presentation_investment_title: Crowdfunding Round — Own a Share in the Future of Aviation
translations.presentation_build_mvp: Build the MVP of Humming Propulsion System (HPS)
translations.presentation_construct_lab: Construct R&D and prototyping lab in Malaysia
translations.presentation_acquire_equipment: Acquire key equipment (3D printer, CNC, lathe)
translations.presentation_hire_team: Hire full core team: engineers, CFD, business dev
translations.presentation_begin_development: Begin advanced development of CROW flying car
translations.presentation_patent_filing: Patent filing, certification, and early marketing
translations.presentation_patent_desc: 12 patents secured for our core technologies, creating a strong competitive moat.
translations.presentation_agreements_desc: Agreements with key aerospace suppliers and hydrogen fuel cell manufacturers.
translations.presentation_regulatory_desc: Working closely with aviation authorities to establish certification pathways.
translations.presentation_timing_desc: Perfect intersection of hydrogen technology maturity and growing demand for sustainable aviation.
translations.presentation_digital_certificate: Digital investor certificate & name in the credits
translations.presentation_flight_sim: Access to flight sim & development updates
translations.presentation_early_reservation: Early reservation or discount for CROW when launched
translations.presentation_vip_invite: VIP invite to MVP launch event in Malaysia
